battleTraits.name: Temptations of Slaanesh
battleTraits.effect:
You receive 6 temptation dice at the start of the battle round. Each time your opponent makes a failed hit roll, a failed wound roll or a failed save roll, you can offer them a temptation dice. If they accept your offer, that roll is replaced with a 6. Rolls replaced in this way cannot be re-rolled or modified.

Each time your opponent accepts your offer of a temptation dice, you gain D6 depravity points. Each time your opponent rejects your offer of a temptation dice, inflict D3 mortal damage on the unit for which the roll was made.

You cannot offer your opponent a temptation dice for the same enemy unit more than once per phase. At the end of the battle round, all remaining temptation dice are lost.

All friendly units gain passive abilities from the table below based on the number of depravity points you have. These abilities are cumulative:
- 12+ TANTALISING TORMENT: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
- 18+ SADISTIC SPITE: This unit's melee weapons have Crit (Mortal).
- 24+ OBLIVIOUS INDULGENCE: This unit has WARD (5+).

enhancements.name: Sceptre of Domination
enhancements.declare: Roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with your general.
enhancements.effect: On a 5+, the unit being rolled for has STRIKE-LAST this phase.

enhancements.name: Twisted Mirror
enhancements.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Shooting Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of your general and roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 4+, subtract 1 from save rolls for that unit until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: Cacophonic Choir
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, make a cacophony roll of D6. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit (roll for each) within 6" of your general that has a Control characteristic less than the cacophony roll.

regimentAbilities.name: Unparalleled Speed
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: That unit has STRIKE-FIRST this phase.

regimentAbilities.name: Locus of Diversion
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, that unit can use a RETREAT ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

abilities.name: Vision of Damnation
abilities.effect: On a 6+, roll 6 dice. For each 4+, you receive 1 depravity point.

abilities.name: Light-Footed Killers
abilities.effect: This unit can use SHOOT abilities even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.

abilities.name: Unrivalled Velocity
abilities.effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for this unit.

abilities.name: Slaughter at Any Cost
abilities.declare: This unit can use this ability if any damage points were allocated to it this turn.
abilities.effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
